calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Oct-31-2013 Discharged

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-13-2013 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-10-2013 Continued To May-29-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Application For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-16-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Kalyn M. Stern, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Fidelity National Title Insurance Company.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Lee J. Harrison.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-20 dismissed without prejudice.
Nancy Van Tassel sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $255,539.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $40,535.79 at the legar rate of 10% per annum of $70.01 per day from August 4, 2011 to March 5, 2013.
Costs: $482.25
Total Judgment in the amount of $296,557.04 plus post-judgment interest as allowed by law.
Judgment signed in open court.
